"'''Shadows of Darkness'''" is a short story written by [[Charlene Newcomb]] (with illustrations by [[Mike Vilardi]]) that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] by [[West End Games]] in November [[1994]]. It was later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] on [[January 21]], [[2005]]. It is set prior to the events of [[Star Wars: The Thrawn Trilogy|the Thrawn Trilogy]].

==Plot summary==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] begins moving against suspected dissidents on [[Garos IV]], kidnapping the son of [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Carl Barzon]], a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] the Empire is pressing into researching [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking technology]]. Using the cover of an inspection tour at the Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], [[Alexandra Winger|Alex]] plants [[Explosive charge/Legends|explosives]] to damage the base's [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] platform. A mistiming in the detonation results in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Dr. Barzon's son, but the Empire does not inform him of the tragedy. Instead, they continue to use the idea of his captive son as leverage against him as they transport Barzon offplanet.
